title: Junior Frontend Developer at Microsoft India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Microsoft India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at Microsoft India South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Microsoft India South Asia Partners:
Microsoft India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India South Asia Partners!
